record.question: Will Javokhir Sindarov win the 2026 FIDE Candidates Tournament?
record.time_horizon_label: Round 13 onward through official FIDE winner declaration
record.rationale_summary: Sindarov still looks overwhelmingly likely to win, but because the move to 99.05% is not matched by independently verified official-state improvement, the disciplined posture is watch-only rather than chasing the repricing.
